description_long: This stereo sound system features a rectangular speaker unit with a dark gray front grille and a wooden enclosure with a rich, reddish-brown wood grain pattern on the sides and top. The speaker is mounted on a tall, slender black stand with a circular base, providing stability and elevating the speaker to ear level. The front face displays a subtle grille texture, while the rear side includes a control panel with various buttons and ports, likely for audio input and power connections. The wood finish adds a touch of elegance, making it suitable for both indoor and outdoor urban environments. The overall design is modern and minimalistic, with clean lines and a focus on functionality. The materials and construction suggest durability and quality sound output.
description: A modern stereo sound system with a wooden speaker on a tall black stand, featuring a gray front grille and a rear control panel. The design is sleek and functional, blending wood and metal elements.
description_view_0: Front view showing the gray speaker grille and the black stand with a circular base.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the reddish-brown wood grain pattern on the speaker enclosure.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the control panel with buttons and ports, as well as the wood finish.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the wood grain pattern and the slender stand.
attribute_speaker_grille_pattern: The speaker grille on the front is a uniform, fine mesh pattern with a subtle texture, likely made of fabric or perforated metal, with no visible decorative elements.
attribute_control_panel_layout: The control panel is located on the rear of the speaker, featuring a rectangular arrangement of buttons and ports, possibly labeled, with a compact and organized layout.
